history.en: A modern crossbreed developed in North America in the late 20th century by crossing a Pug with a Chihuahua. The goal was to create a small companion dog combining the affectionate nature of the Pug with the spirited personality of the Chihuahua. Not recognized by major kennel clubs.
history.zh: A modern crossbreed developed in North America in the late 20th century by crossing a Pug with a Chihuahua. The goal was to create a small companion dog combining the affectionate nature of the Pug with the spirited personality of the Chihuahua. Not recognized by major kennel clubs.
